operating_policy.green_use: Primary/client-facing source when facts appear directly on the source or are operator verified.
operating_policy.yellow_use: Discovery or review-only lead. Requires manual confirmation before client delivery.
operating_policy.red_use: Do not use restricted, private, or prohibited sources in client deliverables.

sources.name: Manual client and analyst intake
sources.publish_policy: Client-facing only after human review and source URL check.

sources.name: Client website
sources.publish_policy: Use for client-owned facts and positioning only.

sources.name: Competitor 1 website
sources.publish_policy: Use only for facts visible on the public competitor site. Summarize with source links.

sources.name: Google Business Profile manual observation
sources.publish_policy: Manual observation only. Do not claim exact rankings without evidence.

sources.name: Local event, chamber, or sponsorship page
sources.publish_policy: Use for visible event, sponsorship, deadline, and application details.

sources.name: Optional public industry RSS feed
sources.publish_policy: Discovery only until reviewed and confirmed against a primary source.
